canonical_definition: A theory-of-mind dataset containing questions based on multi-party dialogues, some of which rest on false premises, to test a model's ability to handle such scenarios.
papers: Causal Interventions Reveal Shared Structure AcrossEnglish Filler–Gap Constructions
Enhancing Reasoning Abilities of SmallLLMs with Cognitive Alignment
